rule.descr: NAT DMZ NGINX 443 - DISABLED until N2 (D1) — enable after D1 (NGINX) deployment, see netlab-n2-runbook §7 + D1 work order
NAT NAT DMZ NGINX 443 - DISABLED until N2 (D1) — enable afte
LAN -> pfSense SSH (22) - baseline (SSH not yet enabled)
[#sanity] ICMP echo to gateway for diagnostics
WG -> pfSense SSH (22) - baseline (SSH not yet enabled)
[V2] VPN → User-Admin admin consoles (no-op until pt2)
[#6] DISABLED - enable only if KC behind TLS termination
[#sanity] ICMP echo to gateway for diagnostics
[#sanity] ICMP echo to gateway for diagnostics
[#sanity] ICMP echo to gateway for diagnostics

revision.description: admin@10.99.100.2 (Local Database): Firewall: Rules - saved/edited a firewall rule.

package.name: Open-VM-Tools
package.descr: VMware Tools is a suite of utilities that enhances the performance of the virtual machine's guest operating system and improves management of the virtual machine.

package.name: WireGuard
suricata
package.descr: High Performance Network IDS, IPS and Security Monitoring engine by OISF.

rule.eve_log_http_extended_headers: accept, accept-charset, accept-datetime, accept-encoding, accept-language, accept-range, age, allow, authorization, cache-control, connection, content-encoding, content-language, content-length, content-location, content-md5, content-range, content-type, cookie, date, dnt, etags, from, last-modified, link, location, max-forwards, origin, pragma, proxy-authenticate, proxy-authorization, range, referrer, refresh, retry-after, server, set-cookie, te, trailer, transfer-encoding, upgrade, vary, via, warning, www-authenticate, x-authenticated-user, x-flash-version, x-forwarded-proto, x-requested-with
